title: NANA Board Declares Emergency Advance on 2020 Dividend in Response to COVID-19
summary: To support our shareholders and their families who are facing economic hardships during the COVID-19 pandemic, the NANA board of directors voted to declare an emergency advance of a portion of the 2020 regular dividend of $2.50 per share to be distributed on April 22, 2020. “Part of NANA’s mission i...
